reforms.description: The Danish government has initiated a review of the business development system, including the innovation system, to evaluate the recent merger of different innovation funding programmes and consider further streamlining innovation policy instruments and funding.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Streamlining innovation policy instruments is expected to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in supporting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: The review aims to significantly improve the innovation funding landscape, indicating a substantial but not structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The government has initiated a review of the business development system, including the innovation system.

reforms.description: The new InnoBooster programme is designed to facilitate innovation in SMEs, ensuring sufficient competition and SME participation in demand-side innovation policies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating innovation in SMEs is expected to enhance competition and drive economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been put into action and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant initiative to support SMEs in innovation, indicating a notable but not transformative change.
reforms.source_quote: The new InnoBooster programme is designed to facilitate innovation in SMEs.
